title: Detection(Ct values) of Yersinia ruckeri with qPCR from eDNA, purified from water samples
author: Henard, Cyril
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These raw Ct values were obtained from eDNA purified from water samples from the experiment this post links to. Four water samples were obtained from each tank. The target for qPCR was recA in Yersinia ruckeri.
steps_raw: These raw Ct values were obtained from eDNA purified from water samples from the experiment this post links to. Four water samples were obtained from each tank. The target for qPCR was recA in Yersinia ruckeri.
